---
title: ""
pagetitle: "`r contrast`"
output: 
  html_document:
    mathjax: null
    self_contained: true
params:
    DAList: !r NULL
    contrast: !r NULL
    model_data: !r NULL
    table_columns: !r NULL
    title_column: !r NULL
    grouping_column: !r NULL
    width: !r 1000
    height: !r 1000
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo = F, include = F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = F, message = F, fig.align = "center", echo = F, cache = F)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(proteoDAstjude)
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.main-container {
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
```

```{r logo, fig.align="left", out.width="40%"}
knitr::include_graphics(path = "/research/rgs01/applications/hpcf/authorized_apps/proteomics_apps/proteoDA/inst/report_templates/CPM_Hz.png", rel_path = F)
```

### Contrast
**Current contrast:** `r params$contrast`

```{r chunk1, results = "asis", fig.keep='none'}
# Extract required params
DAList <- params$DAList
contrast <- params$contrast
model_data <- params$model_data
internal_table_columns <- params$table_columns
title_column <- params$title_column
grouping_column <- params$grouping_column
width <- params$width
height <- params$height
 
# Use per-contrast data and annotation if available
if (!is.null(DAList$data_per_contrast) && contrast %in% names(DAList$data_per_contrast)) {
  counts <- DAList$data_per_contrast[[contrast]]
} else {
  counts <- DAList$data[rownames(model_data), , drop = FALSE]
}
 
if (!is.null(DAList$annotation_per_contrast) && contrast %in% names(DAList$annotation_per_contrast)) {
  anno <- DAList$annotation_per_contrast[[contrast]]
} else {
  anno <- DAList$annotation[rownames(model_data), , drop = FALSE]
}
 
# Ensure annotation matches model_data rows
anno <- anno[rownames(model_data), , drop = FALSE]
 
# Add p-values to annotation
anno$p <- round(model_data$P.Value, 4)
anno$adjusted_p <- round(model_data$adj.P.Val, 4)
 
# Add title column if available
if (!is.null(title_column)) {
  title_values <- stringr::str_trunc(anno[[title_column]], width = 20, side = "right", ellipsis = "...")
  model_data$internal_title_column <- title_values[match(rownames(model_data), rownames(anno))]
} else {
  model_data$internal_title_column <- rownames(model_data)
}
 
# Align group vector with counts
grouping_vector <- DAList$metadata[colnames(counts), grouping_column, drop = TRUE]

# Glimma interactive plot
uams_glimmaXY(
  model_data     = model_data,
  counts         = counts,
  groups         = grouping_vector,
  anno           = anno,
  display.columns= internal_table_columns,
  status.cols    = c("#00bfff", "#858585", "#ff3030"),
  sample.cols    = NULL,
  width          = width,
  height         = height
)

```


```{r}
to_html_table <- function(dataframe) {
 htmltools::tags$table(
  htmltools::tags$thead(htmltools::tags$tr(htmltools::tags$td(" ", style = "text-align:left;"), lapply(colnames(dataframe), function(x) htmltools::tags$th(htmltools::HTML(paste0("&nbsp;&nbsp;"), x), style = "text-align:right;")))),
  htmltools::tags$tbody(
   lapply(1:nrow(dataframe), function(x) {htmltools::tags$tr(htmltools::tags$td(rownames(dataframe)[x], style = "text-align:left;"), lapply(dataframe[x,], function(y) htmltools::tags$td(y, style = "text-align:right;")))})
  ))
}
```

```{r}
# Get contrast matrix,
# ignoring when no contrast matrix
if (is.null(DAList$design$contrast_matrix)) {
  this_contrast_matrix <- as.data.frame(list(" " = "Not applicable"), optional = T, row.names = c(" "))
} else {
  this_contrast_matrix <- as.data.frame(DAList$design$contrast_matrix)[contrast]
}
```


```{r, results='hold'}
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$details(
  htmltools::tags$summary("Model details"),
  htmltools::tags$br(),
  htmltools::tags$strong("Model equation: "),
  DAList$design$design_formula,
  htmltools::tags$br(), 
  htmltools::tags$strong("Design matrix:"),
  htmltools::tags$br(),
  to_html_table(DAList$design$design_matrix),
  htmltools::tags$br(),
  htmltools::tags$strong("Contrast for this report:"),
  htmltools::tags$br(),
  to_html_table(this_contrast_matrix))
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$br()
```
